item.title: Neural Tribunal Adopts Loyalty Tags, Ensuring Ad-Surcharge Officials Feel Right at Home in Their Guilt
item.description: Citizens Now Advised to Flush Skin Bronze and Recite Surcharge Ledgers with Gusto; Just Another Day in Luxury.

item.title: Instituto Peso Albañil García Float Away in Lawsuit Sea
item.description: As the weight of bureaucracy dissipates, mourning rituals commence for the void now left by the gravity regulators.

item.title: Great Nocturnal Famine Declared a Rousing Success: Lords Rejoice as Daylight Becomes Luxury Good
item.description: With serfs nibbling on rivet shavings, Copper Synod celebrates exemplary market discipline in darkness.

item.title: Wasteland Sanitation Authority Declares Ir:Vess Tunnel Flood a Quota Compliance Triumph
item.description: Citizens advised to taste static, count blessings amid overflowing compliance.

item.title: Order of the Tuesday Hem-Scryers Disbands, Leaving Only Unfashionable Sleeves in Their Wake
item.description: Hem-Scryers to blame for lack of sartorial splendor in the days to come — all because one petty decree declared their gazing unlawful.

item.title: Dustspire Enclave Honors Blame While Famine Forgets to Read the Ledger
item.description: In a twist, posthumous honors lead to yesterday's missing volts being reclassified as 'heroic contributions.'

item.title: TEAL-FACED WORKER INSISTS ON PAYING FULL SHOELACE QUOTAS, DESPITE COLLECTIVE CELEBRATION OF SOCRATIC QUESTIONING
item.description: In a system where inquiry is monetized, one man clings to his outdated ideals like a tattered shoelace.

item.title: FASTEST JUNK MAIL IN THE KNOWN UNIVERSE DECLARED OFFICIAL, PERSONAL CORRESPONDENCE DISMISSED AS COSMIC NOISE
item.description: Commissar Thackeray-Voltaire assures citizens that individual letters fall victim to 'secondary void allocation' while junk mail quotas soar.

item.title: Ad Apocalypse: Côte d'Azur Enclaves Mobilize 10,000 Champagne Minds in Emergency Neural Evacuation
item.description: Luxury has never been so taxing — or ticklish.

item.title: GRAND ALLOCATOR SKIPS FUNERAL OF LAST COMPLAINT-FORM CLERK, RATION QUEUES COLLAPSE INTO CHAOS
item.description: In unforeseen twist, living signature of late bureaucrat now required for any service request — supply system jeopardized.
